items.content:
About This Role

We are seeking a Commercial Legal Counsel to support our growing sales organization. You will draft, review, and negotiate a high volume of commercial agreements including SaaS subscriptions, enterprise licenses, partnership agreements, and procurement contracts.

Reporting to the General Counsel, you will also advise on product and privacy matters as they arise. This is a great opportunity to serve as a strategic business partner in a fast-paced technology company.

Responsibilities

  • Draft, review, and negotiate SaaS agreements, MSAs, SOWs, NDAs, and DPAs
  • Advise the Sales team on deal structure, risk assessment, and contract terms
  • Develop and maintain contract templates, playbooks, and clause libraries
  • Support data privacy and compliance initiatives including GDPR and CCPA
  • Manage outside counsel relationships for specialized legal matters

Requirements

  • JD from an accredited law school and active bar membership
  • 5+ years of legal experience with a focus on technology transactions
  • Strong experience drafting and negotiating SaaS and cloud computing agreements
  • Knowledge of data privacy regulations (GDPR, CCPA, HIPAA)
  • Ability to balance legal risk with business pragmatism

Nice to Have

  • In-house experience at a SaaS or technology company
  • Experience with intellectual property licensing
  • Familiarity with open-source software licensing models
